benefits.description: Lost 8 lbs in approximately one month (from 231 to 223 lbs after 5 doses)
Feels appetite suppression but some days hunger is more pronounced

protocol_notes: On 5 mg weekly tirzepatide. This is not first time using tirzepatide; previously purchased online with less effectiveness. Started stricter water intake (2 liters/day) a few days before reporting. Logging meals, focusing on protein and low carb diet. Recently started Beach Body workout program. Ordered elliptical machine. Previously weighed 231 lbs, now 223 lbs.
